title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
